owner-dashboard.title: Real-Time Owner Dashboard
owner-dashboard.heroHeading: Know if today was profitable before you leave the office.
owner-dashboard.heroSubheading: See sales, collections, credit, and low stock for every branch in one real-time dashboard – from your phone.
painBullets: You end the day without knowing if today was profitable.
You rely on accountants to send Excel reports days later.
solutionBullets: Today vs yesterday sales split by cash and credit, updated in real time.
Outstanding balance total with top overdue customers highlighted.
Low stock alerts so you never discover stock-outs after an order is lost.
metricsOrStats: 67% of Gulf SME owners check business status via phone daily.

credit-control.title: Credit Control & Aging Report
credit-control.heroHeading: See exactly who owes you money today – and for how long.
credit-control.heroSubheading: HexaBill’s aging report and credit limits stop 8% revenue leakage to untracked credit.
painBullets: You don’t have a single, trusted list of overdue customers.
Salesmen keep selling on credit even when limits are crossed.
solutionBullets: 0–30 / 30–60 / 60–90+ day buckets with totals per customer.
Per-customer credit limits enforced at invoice time – no silent overrides.
Customer statements and exportable aging PDFs for banks and auditors.
metricsOrStats: Gulf SMEs lose avg 8% revenue annually to untracked credit.

vat-invoicing.title: FTA-Compliant VAT Invoicing
vat-invoicing.heroHeading: Stop worrying about VAT mistakes and FTA fines.
vat-invoicing.heroSubheading: HexaBill calculates 5% UAE VAT automatically on every invoice and keeps your PDFs FTA-ready.
painBullets: Your team enters VAT manually in Excel or generic billing software.
You’re not sure if invoice PDFs meet FTA format requirements.
solutionBullets: Automatic 5% VAT calculation on every invoice line item.
PDF layouts that show base amount, VAT, and total clearly for FTA review.
Monthly VAT summary report ready to share with your accountant.
metricsOrStats: FTA issued 2,300+ fines to UAE businesses in 2025.

route-branch-control.title: Route & Branch Control
route-branch-control.heroHeading: Every route and branch under control – one truth, not five Excels.
route-branch-control.heroSubheading: HexaBill isolates staff by route and branch so you always know where sales and cash really went.
painBullets: Each branch or route keeps its own sheets – you see three versions of the truth.
Salesmen can bill customers that don’t belong to their route.
solutionBullets: Route assignments so each salesman sees only their own customers.
Route P&L: sales, returns, expenses, and profit per route per period.
Multi-branch view with consolidated and per-branch P&L.
metricsOrStats: Gulf B2B companies typically run 3–8 separate sales routes.
Companies with 3+ branches lose 23% more to administrative errors.

inventory-damage.title: Inventory & Damage Tracking
inventory-damage.heroHeading: See exactly where stock went – and stop silent losses.
inventory-damage.heroSubheading: Every movement, adjustment, and damage entry is logged so you can trust your stock count.
painBullets: Warehouse and system stock never match – you discover shortages too late.
Damage and returns are not categorized, making P&L unreliable.
solutionBullets: Per-product stock card showing all sales, purchases, returns, and adjustments.
Damage categories that separate stock-only, ledger-only, and resaleable losses.
Low stock alerts at reorder level per product so you can re-order on time.
metricsOrStats: 40% of Gulf distributors have stock variance over 10% monthly.

staff-audit.title: Staff Permissions & Audit Trail
staff-audit.heroHeading: Let staff work – without giving away control of your system.
staff-audit.heroSubheading: Give sales, accounts, and warehouse teams exactly what they need – and log every risky change.
painBullets: Staff can see and change more data than they should.
You have no trail of who changed what when discounts or prices are edited.
solutionBullets: Role-based permissions so staff only see the screens they need.
Per-user discount limits that block unauthorized giveaways.
Field-level audit trail recording old and new values with timestamp and user.
metricsOrStats: 80% of Gulf distributor fraud involves unauthorized discounts.
